image:image.image:title: Intracoastal Sunset
image:image.image:caption: A small boat runs the waterway as the sky catches fire at last light.

image:image.image:title: Intracoastal Close
image:image.image:caption: Sunset color breaks across the surface of the waterway.

image:image.image:title: Seed Head at the Pond
image:image.image:caption: A dried seed head stands over still water at the pond's edge.

image:image.image:title: Spring Blossom
image:image.image:caption: New blossoms open on a bare branch in early spring light.

image:image.image:title: Wheel at Broadway
image:image.image:caption: The Broadway 360 wheel turns against a clear summer sky.

image:image.image:title: Lighthouse at Broadway
image:image.image:caption: A replica lighthouse rises against a clear blue sky.

image:image.image:title: Broadway at Sunset
image:image.image:caption: The wheel and waterfront rides glow under a burning sunset sky.

image:image.image:title: Storm Over Garden City Pier
image:image.image:caption: Waves break beneath the pier as a storm rolls in overhead.

image:image.image:title: Heron in the Marsh
image:image.image:caption: A heron wades the shallows at low tide.

image:image.image:title: Beneath the Live Oaks
image:image.image:caption: Spanish moss frames a view out over the marsh.

image:image.image:title: Surfside Pier, Blue Hour
image:image.image:caption: The rebuilt pier glows above the water as the town lights come on.

image:image.image:title: Surfside Pier at Night
image:image.image:caption: The pier reaches back toward shore under its own light. Aerial night exposure.

image:image.image:title: Surfside Pier, Aerial Silhouette
image:image.image:caption: Only the pier's lights break the dark water below.

image:image.image:title: Rust and Rainbow
image:image.image:caption: Four vintage Volkswagen buses sit retired in the grass along the highway.

image:image.image:title: Waccamaw Bend
image:image.image:caption: The river bends through bare cypress on a gray winter afternoon.

image:image.image:title: Waccamaw River, High Above
image:image.image:caption: The river threads for miles through coastal forest, seen from high altitude.

image:image.image:title: Waccamaw Confluence
image:image.image:caption: Two channels of the river meet, seen from directly overhead.

image:image.image:title: Surfside Pier, Blue Hour
image:image.image:caption: The rebuilt pier glows above the water as the town lights come on.

image:image.image:title: Moon
image:image.image:caption: A gibbous moon rises alone in a black sky.

image:image.image:title: Night Sky Through Pines
image:image.image:caption: Stars gather in a gap between silhouetted pines.

image:image.image:title: Blood Moon
image:image.image:caption: The moon turns deep red during a total lunar eclipse.

image:image.image:title: Stars Over Surfside
image:image.image:caption: A long exposure of the surf under a star-filled sky.

image:image.image:title: Pier Lights at Midnight
image:image.image:caption: String lights outline the pier's pavilion against a black sky, moonlight tracking across the water.

image:image.image:title: Canopy of Stars
image:image.image:caption: The Milky Way's haze spreads over a ring of pines.

image:image.image:title: Moonrise Through the Pines
image:image.image:caption: Moonlight rims the trees as stars fill the gaps between branches.

image:image.image:title: Intracoastal at Night
image:image.image:caption: A long exposure over still water, the waterway lit only by the moon and shoreline.

image:image.image:title: Green Current
image:image.image:caption: Chemigram, looping current rendered in acid green.

image:image.image:title: Phase Shift
image:image.image:caption: A triptych chemigram, three panels of chemical reaction across a single frame.

image:image.image:title: Amber Bloom
image:image.image:caption: Chemigram, developer bleeding gold and black across the paper.

image:image.image:title: Black Bloom
image:image.image:caption: Chemigram in high contrast, chemical reaction outlined in white.

image:image.image:title: Magenta Drift
image:image.image:caption: Chemigram, magenta and amber tones pooling across the emulsion.

image:image.image:title: Lumen Print No. 1
image:image.image:caption: Botanical lumen print, sun-exposed directly on photo paper.

image:image.image:title: Lumen Print No. 2
image:image.image:caption: Lumen print of a flower in bloom, colors shifted by exposure time.

image:image.image:title: Lumen Print No. 3
image:image.image:caption: Lumen print of leaf and stem, warm tones from a long sun exposure.

image:image.image:title: Pasture Fence
image:image.image:caption: A weathered fence line, a horse grazing soft in the background.

image:image.image:title: Garden City Pier
image:image.image:caption: Storm light and breaking surf beneath the pier, in monochrome.

image:image.image:title: Surfside Pier After Dark
image:image.image:caption: An aerial view of the pier lit alone against the night.

image:image.image:title: Weathered Chair
image:image.image:caption: A collapsing adirondack chair, reclaimed by the treeline.

image:image.image:title: Web and Spider
image:image.image:caption: A garden spider rebuilds its web among the fall foliage.

image:image.image:title: Winter on the Waccamaw
image:image.image:caption: A boat works the river beneath a bruised winter sky, seen from altitude.

image:image.image:title: Waccamaw Bend
image:image.image:caption: The river bends through bare cypress on a gray winter afternoon.

image:image.image:title: Waccamaw River, High Above
image:image.image:caption: The river threads for miles through coastal forest, seen from high altitude.

image:image.image:title: Waccamaw Serpentine
image:image.image:caption: Another pass over the river's bends, green canopy in every direction.

image:image.image:title: Alligator in the Brush
image:image.image:caption: An alligator rests low in the reeds along the water's edge.

image:image.image:title: Ring-Billed Gull
image:image.image:caption: A ring-billed gull poses at The Market Common.

image:image.image:title: Gulls on the Rail
image:image.image:caption: Gulls line a railing at The Market Common's lake.

image:image.image:title: Great Blue Heron
image:image.image:caption: A great blue heron hunts the shallows at low tide.

image:image.image:title: Rooster
image:image.image:caption: A bantam rooster crows from a fence post.

image:image.image:title: Fourth of July
image:image.image:caption: Fireworks burst over the palms on Independence Day.

image:image.image:title: Full Throttle
image:image.image:caption: A jet boat carves a hard turn, spray catching the afternoon light.

image:image.image:title: 756A0017
image:image.image:caption: Fans make their way into Mercedes-Benz Stadium ahead of the Haiti-Morocco FIFA World Cup Group C match.

image:image.image:title: 756A0022
image:image.image:caption: World Cup signage decorates downtown Atlanta ahead of the Haiti-Morocco match.

image:image.image:title: 756A0024
image:image.image:caption: A costumed "Super Haitiman" poses with fans outside Mercedes-Benz Stadium before kickoff.

image:image.image:title: 756A0027
image:image.image:caption: World Cup mural art lines the concourse on the walk into Mercedes-Benz Stadium.

image:image.image:title: 756A0033
image:image.image:caption: Mercedes-Benz Stadium in downtown Atlanta, host site of the Haiti-Morocco FIFA World Cup Group C match.

image:image.image:title: 756A0035
image:image.image:caption: Fans gather in the fan zone outside Mercedes-Benz Stadium before kickoff.

image:image.image:title: 756A0042
image:image.image:caption: A general view of the pitch at Mercedes-Benz Stadium as fans file in before kickoff.

image:image.image:title: 756A0044
image:image.image:caption: Morocco takes the pitch ahead of their FIFA World Cup Group C match against Haiti.

image:image.image:title: 756A0046
image:image.image:caption: Haiti takes the pitch ahead of their FIFA World Cup Group C match against Morocco.

image:image.image:title: 756A0066
image:image.image:caption: Grounds crew waters the pitch at Mercedes-Benz Stadium ahead of kickoff.

image:image.image:title: 756A0069
image:image.image:caption: Grounds crew finishes watering the pitch moments before kickoff.

image:image.image:title: 756A0119
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's goalkeeper warms up ahead of kickoff.

image:image.image:title: 756A0153
image:image.image:caption: Haiti players take the field for pregame warmups.

image:image.image:title: 756A0158
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's No. 11 warms up ahead of kickoff.

image:image.image:title: 756A0162
image:image.image:caption: Haiti and Morocco players share the pitch during pregame warmups.

image:image.image:title: 756A0176
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's goalkeeper continues warmups ahead of kickoff.

image:image.image:title: 756A0223
image:image.image:caption: Morocco's goalkeeper warms up ahead of kickoff.

image:image.image:title: 756A0230
image:image.image:caption: Haiti players run through pregame warmups.

image:image.image:title: 756A0246
image:image.image:caption: Crews prepare the pitch for the pregame ceremony.

image:image.image:title: 756A0253
image:image.image:caption: Final preparations are made for the pregame ceremony at Mercedes-Benz Stadium.

image:image.image:title: 756A0262
image:image.image:caption: The pregame ceremony gets underway at Mercedes-Benz Stadium.

image:image.image:title: 756A0264
image:image.image:caption: Performers take part in the pregame ceremony ahead of kickoff.

image:image.image:title: 756A0267
image:image.image:caption: The pregame ceremony continues on the pitch at Mercedes-Benz Stadium.

image:image.image:title: 756A0268
image:image.image:caption: The pregame ceremony closes out ahead of kickoff.

image:image.image:title: 756A0279
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's No. 15 challenges Morocco's No. 10 in the first half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0280
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's No. 22 battles Morocco's No. 23 for the ball in the first half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0284
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's No. 22 and Morocco's No. 23 continue their first-half battle for possession.

image:image.image:title: 756A0302
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's No. 22 challenges Morocco's No. 24 in the first half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0305
image:image.image:caption: Morocco's No. 20 breaks away in the first half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0318
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's No. 4 challenges a pass from Morocco's No. 2 in the first half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0341
image:image.image:caption: Morocco's No. 23 fires a shot in the first half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0354
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's No. 5 and goalkeeper combine to block a Morocco shot in the first half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0395
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's No. 10 takes a free kick in the first half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0435
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's No. 22 shoots on goal under pressure from Morocco's No. 36.

image:image.image:title: 756A0441
image:image.image:caption: Haiti celebrates their first goal of the match in the first half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0466
image:image.image:caption: Morocco's No. 20 shoots on goal as Haiti's No. 5 challenges in the first half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0471
image:image.image:caption: Haiti goalkeeper No. 1 makes the save in the first half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0496
image:image.image:caption: Morocco takes a corner kick in the first half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0501
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's No. 5 clears a Morocco shot off the line in the first half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0517
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's bench watches the action during the first half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0519
image:image.image:caption: Morocco's bench watches the action during the first half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0566
image:image.image:caption: Haiti celebrates their second goal of the match in the first half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0569
image:image.image:caption: Morocco's No. 2 takes a free kick in first-half stoppage time.

image:image.image:title: 756A0591
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's goalkeeper makes a save in first-half stoppage time.

image:image.image:title: 756A0614
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's No. 10 takes a free kick in the second half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0645
image:image.image:caption: Morocco's No. 2 takes a free kick in the second half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0650
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's wall blocks a free kick from Morocco's No. 2.

image:image.image:title: 756A0685
image:image.image:caption: Morocco celebrates a goal in the second half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0699
image:image.image:caption: Morocco goalkeeper Yassine Bounou plays the ball out of the back under pressure from Haiti's No. 20 in the second half.

image:image.image:title: 756A0710
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's No. 9 takes a free kick in second-half stoppage time.

image:image.image:title: 756A0719
image:image.image:caption: Morocco's goalkeeper saves a free kick from Haiti's No. 9 in second-half stoppage time.

image:image.image:title: 756A0732
image:image.image:caption: Haiti's No. 25 takes a corner kick in second-half stoppage time.

image:image.image:title: 756A0018
image:image.image:caption: Auction displays are set up ahead of the Horry-Georgetown Technical College Foundation's "One Night in Paris" gala.

image:image.image:title: 756A0037
image:image.image:caption: A table is set for guests at the Horry-Georgetown Technical College Foundation gala.

image:image.image:title: 756A0098
image:image.image:caption: Culinary institute students prepare dishes in the kitchen ahead of the gala dinner.

image:image.image:title: 756A0119
image:image.image:caption: A trumpeter performs for guests as the Horry-Georgetown Technical College Foundation gala gets underway.

image:image.image:title: 756A0132
image:image.image:caption: Croissants and place settings await guests at the "One Night in Paris" themed dinner.

image:image.image:title: 756A0140
image:image.image:caption: Guests browse the silent auction displays during the Horry-Georgetown Technical College Foundation gala.

image:image.image:title: 756A0147
image:image.image:caption: A pastry Eiffel Tower centerpiece anchors the dessert table for the gala's "One Night in Paris" theme.

image:image.image:title: 756A0152
image:image.image:caption: The culinary institute's chef and students pose together in the kitchen.

image:image.image:title: 756A0176
image:image.image:caption: Live music sets the mood as guests mingle before dinner.

image:image.image:title: 756A0186
image:image.image:caption: Horry-Georgetown Technical College's president poses with guests at the "Passport to Paris" step-and-repeat.

image:image.image:title: 756A0193
image:image.image:caption: Guests gather in the atrium during the Horry-Georgetown Technical College Foundation gala's cocktail hour.

image:image.image:title: 756A0206
image:image.image:caption: A chef and culinary institute students pose in the kitchen during the gala.

image:image.image:title: 756A0216
image:image.image:caption: Plated desserts await guests at the Horry-Georgetown Technical College Foundation gala.

image:image.image:title: 756A0266
image:image.image:caption: Horry-Georgetown Technical College's president addresses guests during dinner.

image:image.image:title: 756A0376
image:image.image:caption: An auctioneer works the room during the gala's live auction.

image:image.image:title: 756A0391
image:image.image:caption: Horry-Georgetown Technical College's president gives remarks to gala guests.

image:image.image:title: 756A0424
image:image.image:caption: The Horry-Georgetown Technical College Culinary Institute at the Market Common campus, site of the Foundation's annual gala.

image:image.image:title: World Cup Diving Save
image:image.image:caption: A diving save at the goalmouth, FIFA World Cup Group C.

image:image.image:title: Baby Portrait
image:image.image:caption: A quiet moment of light and curiosity.

image:image.image:title: Bench Swing Silhouette
image:image.image:caption: Two figures pause together at the water's edge.

image:image.image:title: Swing Set
image:image.image:caption: A mother and child share a quiet moment on the swings.

image:image.image:title: Father and Children
image:image.image:caption: A father steadies his son mid-game.

image:image.image:title: Monkey Bars, Golden Hour
image:image.image:caption: Backlit joy on the playground at golden hour.

image:image.image:title: Snowfall Portrait
image:image.image:caption: A child pauses in falling snow.

image:image.image:title: Snowfall Night Portrait
image:image.image:caption: A portrait caught mid-snowfall, lit from within.

image:image.image:title: Dog Portrait
image:image.image:caption: A close portrait, ears up and alert.

image:image.image:title: Camouflaged Lizard
image:image.image:caption: An anole blends into the leaves, barely visible.

image:image.image:title: Night Aerial Pier
image:image.image:caption: An aerial view of the pier lit against the night.

image:image.image:title: Ferris Wheel
image:image.image:caption: The wheel turns against a clear afternoon sky.

image:image.image:title: Vintage VW Buses
image:image.image:caption: Four retired Volkswagen buses, weathered and colorful.

image:image.image:title: Storm Pier
image:image.image:caption: Waves break beneath the pier as a storm rolls in.

image:image.image:title: Moonlit River
image:image.image:caption: Moonlight traces a path across still water.

image:image.image:title: Moonrise Detail
image:image.image:caption: The moon's surface, caught in sharp detail.

image:image.image:title: Waterway Sunset
image:image.image:caption: A boat runs the waterway as the sky catches fire.

image:image.image:title: Sunset Water Abstract
image:image.image:caption: Sunset color dissolves into abstraction on moving water.

image:image.image:title: Sand and Glass Macro
image:image.image:caption: Sea glass and sand grains, magnified.

image:image.image:title: Sketching Outdoors
image:image.image:caption: An artist sketches quietly in the shade.

image:image.image:title: Lily
image:image.image:caption: A lily opens in soft monochrome light.

image:image.image:title: Lumen Print
image:image.image:caption: A lumen print, sun-exposed directly onto photo paper.

image:image.image:title: Light Painting Triptych
image:image.image:caption: A single gesture of light, rendered three ways.
